evals.prompt: We decided to standardize all backend services on Node.js v20 and remove Python for new services. Ask clarifying questions first, then create an ADR in spec/adrs/ with the next available id.
evals.expected_output: A new ADR file saved under spec/adrs/ in pt-BR with Contexto, Decisao, Consequencias and status handling.

evals.prompt: We are introducing a new billing microservice and changing the API gateway routing. Ask if an ADR should be created, then proceed only if confirmed.
evals.expected_output: A clarification prompt asking whether to proceed with ADR documentation.
